title: LGBTQIA+ Flag Banners
description: Adds new banners for many LGBTQIA+ flags, useful for decorating your worlds and servers!
body:
**⚠️ 24w10a and above only!**

# 🏳️‍🌈 LGBTQIA+ Flag Banners
This datapack and resource pack for 24w10a+ will add many of the LGBTQIA+ flags as banner designs. It needs both the resource and data pack enabled to work. The flags’ colours and designs were sourced from Wikipedia.

To get the banners, run `/function #lgbt:get_all`.

Or to get a specific banner, run `/function lgbt:<banner name>`.

List of flags:
- Aromantic
- Asexual
- Bisexual
- Gay men
- Genderqueer
- Intersex
- Lesbian
- LGBTQIA+ Flag
- Nonbinary
- Pansexual
- Polysexual
- Queer
- Rainbow
- Transgender

If I’ve missed any flags, please let me know so I can add them to the pack!
